tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

[Verse]
                       
Any other day
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
I would call and you would say[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]                  
"Baby, how's your day?"[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
But today, it ain't the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Every other word[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch] 
Is "uh-huh" yeah "okay"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Could it be that you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
are at the crib with another lady?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           
If you took it there,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
first of all, let me say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
I am not the one[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
to sit around, and be played[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
So prove yourself to me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
if I'm the girl that you claim[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Why don't you say the thangs[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
that you said to me yesterday[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I know you say that I am assuming things[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Why can't you just tell the truth?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
